title: helichrysum solitarium
intro: Helichrysum solitarium, also known as the solitary curly gold or mountain helichrysum, is a flowering plant species within the daisy family, characterized by its yellow daisy-like flowers and silvery-gray foliage. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of helichrysum solitarium include reducing inflammation, improving circulation, and aiding in the healing process of injuries and diseases. The plant is commonly prepared as a tea, essential oil, or tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
